rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel The Depositions Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant Boeing Company And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And Or Its Attorneys
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, August 10, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of the person most qualified and custodian of records of defendant Boeing Co. and request for sanctions was continued to give the parties an opportunity to meet and confer. If all issues raised by the motion are not resolved before then, by 4:30pm on August 9, the parties are required to send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, what issues remain unresolved and then appear at the hearing at 9am on August 10. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, August 10, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00a.m., Line 2. rulings.Case Title: LLOYD KENDRICK et al VS. BORGWARNER, INC. INDIVIDUALLY AND AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Re-Open Discovery, Compelling Deposition Of Witness Roy Neidigh And Permitting A Second Deposition Of Witness Roy Neidigh
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, August 10, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00a.m., Line 2. Defendants Toyota Motor Sales, USA, Inc. and Dana Companies LLC¿s motion to re-open discovery, compelling deposition of witness Roy Neidigh and permitting a second deposition of witness Roy Neidigh is granted. Plaintiff¿s request for a protective order limiting the scope and duration of Mr. Neidigh¿s deposition is denied. All defendants as well as plaintiffs are permitted to ask questions of Mr. Neidigh concerning his knowledge of Lloyd¿s Automotive and exposure to asbestos by Mr. and Mrs. Kendrick. No defendant acted in an irresponsible or dilatory manner such that it should be precluded from seeking this information. While the deposition should proceed expeditiously and focus on product identification causation, as of now there is no basis to limit its scope or duration. = (220/HEK)
